summary: Added a 400ms fallback in StatsSection StatCard so the count-up animation always starts, preventing the metrics from staying at 0.
notes: Change is limited to the StatCard effect: added a fallback setTimeout to call startAnimation() and clearTimeout in cleanup. No API, data source, or team-count logic was changed. Smoke test passed, but manual visual QA is still required to confirm the stats count up instead of remaining at 0.
